steps.title: Set up total time for each option
steps.content:
Walking takes 20 minutes.
The bus requires waiting $w$ minutes plus a 5-minute ride, for a total of $w + 5$ minutes.

steps.title: Write the inequality for walking to be faster
steps.content:
Walking is faster when its time is less than the bus time:
$$20 < w + 5$$
This is equivalent to:
$$w + 5 > 20$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
